chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-897 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 04-10-2023 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional A.G a/w Najaf Ali Janveri, Accounts Clerk on behalf of CMO, M.C, Khairpur. ***** Accounts Clerk, Municipal Committee, Khairpur has filed statement together with original cheques amounting to Rs.100,000/- dated 11.09.2023 in the name of petitioner, which is handed over to Mr. Bhanbhro for delivering the same to the petitioner. He, however, undertakes remaining pensionery benefits of Rs. 5,33,569/- would be paid to the petitioner in four equal installments per month. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied does not press this petition, which is accordingly disposed of. However, non-payment or default in aforesaid amount to the petitioner would expose the respondents No.2&3 to the contempt proceedings. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
